title: Campaign Monitor vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Campaign Monitor vs Flodesk. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool fits your needs.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs Flodesk: Detailed Comparison
intro: Campaign Monitor and Flodesk are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Campaign Monitor excels for agencies managing multiple brands, while Flodesk targets visual creators and designers seeking simplicity. This guide breaks down their key differences to help you choose the right tool.

comparison_table.tool_a: Multi-brand management, journey designer, smart segments
comparison_table.tool_b: Unlimited subscribers, stunning templates, checkout forms, link in bio

choose_a_if: You manage multiple client brands and need dedicated multi-brand management tools
You need transactional email capabilities built-in
You're starting small with under 500 subscribers and want the lowest entry price
choose_b_if: You're a visual creator, designer, or photographer prioritizing beautiful email aesthetics
You have unlimited subscriber growth plans and want predictable flat-rate pricing
You need e-commerce features like checkout forms and link-in-bio functionality

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than Flodesk?
faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. Campaign Monitor wins for agencies managing multiple brands with advanced segmentation, while Flodesk excels for creative professionals seeking simplicity and unlimited subscribers. Flodesk has significantly higher customer satisfaction ratings (4.8 G2, 4.7 Trustpilot vs 4.1 and 3.2).

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or Flodesk?
faq.a: Campaign Monitor starts at just $11/month, making it cheaper for small lists. However, Flodesk's $38/month flat-rate includes unlimited subscribers, making it better value if you grow beyond 2,500-5,000 subscribers. The true cost comparison depends entirely on your subscriber count.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list exports and imports. Most subscribers can migrate their contact lists easily, though you'll need to recreate workflows and templates in your new platform. Campaign Monitor provides documentation to help with the migration process.
